news.summary: A Gaza-bound ship carrying aid began its voyage from Sweden, weeks after Israeli forces intercepted a previous aid ship.

news.headline: Kenyans protest planned US Ebola quarantine facility
news.summary: Hundreds protest near the site of the planned facility, which would serve US nationals exposed to the virus.
